children.name: class com.arrnel.tests.model.dto.ApiErrorDTO cannot be cast to class com.arrnel.tests.model.dto.payment.CreateOperationResponseDTO (com.arrnel.tests.model.dto.ApiErrorDTO and com.arrnel.tests.model.dto.payment.CreateOperationResponseDTO are in unnamed module of loader 'app')
